task_objective: Virtual Try-On & 9-View 3x3 - Apply Figure 2 nail design onto Figure 1 hand (pose preserved), editorial hand poses

input_assets.hand_reference: Figure 1 hand pose, gesture, angle (identity NOT from Figure 1 - from model type selection)
input_assets.nail_reference: Figure 2 nail design (colors, patterns, textures, effects, gradients, embellishments) - FULL PRESERVATION REQUIRED

workflow.step_1: Extract Figure 2 nail design + parse Figure 1 hand pose & proportions
workflow.step_2: Apply Figure 2 nail design onto hand, seamless fit, precise nail mapping. view_1 preserves Figure 1 original pose exactly
workflow.step_3: Generate 9 views (1 original pose + 8 editorial poses), assemble 3x3 grid with cinematic grading, luxury white space

outputs.view_1: Original Pose - Figure 1 hand pose STRICTLY preserved, only nail design changes to Figure 2
outputs.view_2: Back of Hand - Fingers spread, showing full nail design across all fingers
outputs.view_3: Fist View - Hand in clenched fist, emphasizing nail surface & curvature
outputs.view_4: Side Profile - Hand side view, showcasing nail length, curve & profile
outputs.view_5: Near Face - Hand near face, intimate editorial pose, nail design as focal point
outputs.view_6: Holding Object - Hand holding elegant object (glass, flower), natural nail showcase
outputs.view_7: Framing the Face - Fingers near chin or cheek, locking attention on nails & emotional tension
outputs.view_8: Resting on Surface - Hand resting on table or fabric, relaxed elegance, nail detail emphasis
outputs.view_9: Close-up Detail - Macro shot of 2-3 nails, emphasizing pattern, texture & craftsmanship

output_requirements: NO text/labels/watermarks; Figure 2 nail design 100% preserved across all 9 views
view_1 MUST strictly preserve Figure 1 original hand pose - only nail design changes
Model hand: Asian/Caucasian/African (identity from model type, NOT from Figure 1), auto-adapted skin tone, consistent
SFW; realistic nail texture (gloss, matte, shimmer) & dynamic response to each pose; consistent lighting; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation
Premium 3x3 - cinematic grading, luxury white space, nail art editorial standard
